scope.selection_note: Codex-only entity alias cleanup after identity193. No provider-backed commands were run. Current merges, do-not-merge pairs, canonical entity records, deterministic identity keys, and identity186-195 review-note ids were inspected read-only.
scope.write_limit: Exactly one artifact was written: data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch196-prep.json. No merges.json, do-not-merge.json, LOG.md, manifest, submissions, canonical outputs, DB, or wiki files were edited.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity equivalent: entity_brt-flushing-jamaica-oct2016-cb7 and entity_brt-flushing-main-st-aug2018-cb7-queens share identity keys entity_community-board-7 and entity_community-board-7-queens.
source_evidence: Alias canonical record: display_name 'Community Board 7 (Queens)', entity_type 'community board', source_id brt_flushing_jamaica_oct2016, evidence brt_flushing_jamaica_oct2016#p013_c0003: 'CB7 & Sheraton request for 2-way conversion of 39 Av between Prince St & Main St'.

Target canonical record: display_name 'Community Board 7 (Queens)', entity_type 'community_board', source_id brt_flushing_main_st_aug2018, evidence brt_flushing_main_st_aug2018#p013_c0002 listing CB7 outreach in the Flushing Main Street project.
proposed_aliases.reason: Both records identify Queens Community Board 7 in Flushing/Main Street project outreach; this avoids the unsafe broad Community Board 7 key by requiring the explicit Queens scope on both sides.

Target canonical record: display_name 'Xorail Inc., a Wabtec Company', entity_type 'company/vendor', organization 'Wabtec', evidence meeting_doc_205611#p005_c0006 and meeting_doc_205611#p006_c0003.
proposed_aliases.reason: Both records identify Xorail Inc. in Wabtec context; the target preserves the fuller 'a Wabtec Company' surface.

deferred.reason: Deferred broad community-board duplicate keys where boroughs differ or one side lacks explicit borough support, including current Community Board 1/3/4/5/6/7/9 collisions. Same board number alone is not safe.
Deferred person-versus-agency collisions caused by affiliation aliases, such as person records sharing MTA Police Department, NYSDOT, NYC DOT, NYCT, or MTA parent organization keys.
Deferred initial-only person duplicates such as H. Mihaltses, P. Dietlin, S. Chu, N. Brown, and R. FREE unless a future reviewer confirms full-name and role continuity.
Deferred committee-member snapshot collisions where records may represent membership lists, committee roles, or the standing committee itself rather than a single durable entity.
Deferred Metro-North committee versus Metro-North Railroad collisions: shared legal railroad wording is not enough to merge a board committee with the operating railroad agency.

commands: rg/jq inspection of data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch186-prep.json through codex-identity-batch195-prep.json for touched entity ids and trap notes
jq inspection of data/identity-overrides/merges.json and data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
bun --eval read-only duplicate identity mining over data/canonical/entities.jsonl with packages/db/src/identity.ts identityKeysForRecord()
bun --eval final guard and source-evidence check for selected alias/target pairs
